programme.title: Dance Moms: Episode
programme.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions. Their mothers clash over favoritism, pressure, and their children’s roles within the team. Intense rehearsals, rivalries, and emotional conflicts drive drama on and off the stage.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: (PG) Part 2 of the all-new Dance Moms Chatter talk show welcomes none other than Abby Lee Miller herself, Dance Mom Melissa and celebrity blogger Nadine Rajabi and comedian Alec Mapa.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: (PG) After several months in Hollywood, Abby returns to the Abby Lee Dance Company to find her dancers have been slacking off...all except Maddie and Mackenzie.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions. Their mothers clash over favoritism, pressure, and their children’s roles within the team. Intense rehearsals, rivalries, and emotional conflicts drive drama on and off the stage.
